rules.text_en: rule-001: All messages are JSON objects. Keys are short strings, values can be strings, numbers, arrays, or nested objects.
rule-002: Replace common JSON keys with single-letter symbols. Use this mapping: t→"type", d→"data", r→"ref", i→"id", a→"array", o→"object". The decoder expands symbols to full keys.

rule-003: If a key in the JSON object is a single letter not listed in rule‑002, treat it as a literal key (do not expand). If a key is a string longer than one character, leave it unchanged. This ensures unknown keys are preserved.
